data.body: STORY F change 702: LLM-Review+1 (PASS) but Verified-1 — CI FAIL on ubuntu py3.12 ONLY (py3.11, py3.13, macos ALL PASSED). Failing test: tests/interfaces/io/test_import_batch_resume.py::test_benchmark_commit_count_is_ceil_per_pass with 'git commit failed while holding lock: invalid object ... Error building trees' — a git-store concurrency/tree-building error in the reconciler INTEGRATION tier, entirely unrelated to the audit UI (templates/route/config can't touch git store concurrency). Single-version failure = classic flake. Commenting 'recheck' to re-run CI.
